isi.lyrics:
Lyric B.I - 추락 (Free fall)

Romanization

churakhaneun geon jungyohan ge anya
tteoreojil geugosi neoramyeon
i mameun birok jogak nagetjiman
ummyeongi neoreul sarangharaneunde

dan han beonui nun matchumeurodo
han sarami gajin seosa ttawineun
swipge jaeguchugi dwae
sarangiraneun ireumui
pamyeolkkaji kkeureoaneul su isseo

la li la li la lili
goun geudae ipkkorireul
ollil su itdamyeon
nan norae bureulge
la li la li la lili
nae majimak yoksimi
dwae jun neol wihae
nameun gippeumeul julge

churakhaneun geon jungyohan ge anya
tteoreojil geugosi neoramyeon
i mameun birok jogak nagetjiman
ummyeongi neoreul sarangharaneunde

sumaneun bimireul gongyuhadeon boreumdalgwaui myeot beonui gongnon
gyeolloneun gieoi butjapgo sipeun yeoljeongi neo bakkeneun eopseo
siindeureun malhae sunaeran kkeutnae bodapbatji mothaneun jeongyeol
amuryeom eottae ige nae yeokharinggeol

churakhaneun geon jungyohan ge anya
tteoreojil geugosi neoramyeon
i mameun birok jogak nagetjiman
ummyeongi neoreul sarangharaneunde

la li la li la lili
goun geudae ipkkorireul
ollil su itdamyeon
nan norae bureulge
la li la li la lili
nae majimak yoksimi
dwae jun neol wihae



Hangeul

추락하는 건 중요한 게 아냐
떨어질 그곳이 너라면
이 맘은 비록 조각 나겠지만
운명이 너를 사랑하라는데

단 한 번의 눈 맞춤으로도
한 사람이 가진 서사 따위는
쉽게 재구축이 돼
사랑이라는 이름의
파멸까지 끌어안을 수 있어

la li la li la lili
고운 그대 입꼬리를
올릴 수 있다면
난 노래 부를게
la li la li la lili
내 마지막 욕심이
돼 준 널 위해
남은 기쁨을 줄게

추락하는 건 중요한 게 아냐
떨어질 그곳이 너라면
이 맘은 비록 조각 나겠지만
운명이 너를 사랑하라는데

수많은 비밀을 공유하던 보름달과의 몇 번의 공론
결론은 기어이 붙잡고 싶은 열정이 너 밖에는 없어
시인들은 말해 순애란 끝내 보답받지 못하는 정열
아무렴 어때 이게 내 역할인걸

추락하는 건 중요한 게 아냐
떨어질 그곳이 너라면
이 맘은 비록 조각 나겠지만
운명이 너를 사랑하라는데

la li la li la lili
고운 그대 입꼬리를
올릴 수 있다면
난 노래 부를게
la li la li la lili
내 마지막 욕심이
돼 준 널 위해

isi.lyrics:
Lyric B.I - PARADE

Romanization

naui saranga eunhasureul jomyeong sama
kkeutnaji aneul chumeul chueora

jeolmeumui gyeokdong jangmipbit yeongnong
kkumgatdeon donggong pureureul mongnong

neowa naui last parade parade
geonjohan jinsireun sumgin chae
neowa naui last parade parade
hwaryeohan geojiseul hyanghae

Welcome to the naui majimak nangman
jeulgeoun soran sogeul hejipdeon timeline
sseuldeeomneun jiseun hanado eopseotgo
deo gogaldoegi jeone ssodanaeneun sangsang
I’ve been there done that
It’s the most magical place
neon naege malhaetji na gateun nomdo haengboge
sojil itgo ajik eoridago
seulpeumgati pom naneun geol gieoko kkeureoanggo salgien
magi naerigo buri kkeojigi jeone
pokjuk, gaeul, beotkkot, noeul gateun parade
igeo hana itji mara
Toi qui m’aimais Moi qui t’aimais

neowa naui last parade parade
geonjohan jinsireun sumgin chae
neowa naui last parade parade
hwaryeohan geojiseul hyanghae

I had a good run
Didn’t I? Didn’t I?
We had a good time
Didn’t we? Didn’t we?
i yeojeongeun ajik kkeutnaji anasseo
nae gamjeongui sisoga heundeulliji antorok
ajigeun kkumeseo kkaeji anado doendamyeo
neon naega piryohadago geu hammadiman geonnejwo
donghwa sogeul saldeon nae sigani da hagi jeone
pokjuk, gaeul, beotkkot, noeul gateun parade
igeo hana itji mara
Toi qui m’aimais Moi qui t’aimais

neowa naui last parade parade

naui saranga eunhasureul jomyeong sama
kkeutnaji aneul chumeul chueora

jeolmeumui gyeokdong jangmipbit yeongnong
kkum gatdeon donggong pureureul mongnong


Hangeul

나의 사랑아 은하수를 조명 삼아
끝나지 않을 춤을 추어라

젊음의 격동 장밋빛 영롱
꿈같던 동공 푸르를 몽롱

너와 나의 last parade parade
건조한 진실은 숨긴 채
너와 나의 last parade parade
화려한 거짓을 향해

Welcome to the 나의 마지막 낭만
즐거운 소란 속을 헤집던 timeline
쓸데없는 짓은 하나도 없었고
더 고갈되기 전에 쏟아내는 상상
I’ve been there done that
It’s the most magical place
넌 내게 말했지 나 같은 놈도 행복에
소질 있고 아직 어리다고
슬픔같이 폼 나는 걸 기어코 끌어안고 살기엔
막이 내리고 불이 꺼지기 전에
폭죽, 가을, 벛꽃, 노을 같은 parade
이거 하나 잊지 마라
Toi qui m’aimais Moi qui t’aimais

너와 나의 last parade parade
건조한 진실은 숨긴 채
너와 나의 last parade parade
화려한 거짓을 향해

I had a good run
Didn’t I? Didn’t I?
We had a good time
Didn’t we? Didn’t we?
이 여정은 아직 끝나지 않았어
내 감정의 시소가 흔들리지 않도록
아직은 꿈에서 깨지 않아도 된다며
넌 내가 필요하다고 그 한마디만 건네줘
동화 속을 살던 내 시간이 다 하기 전에
폭죽, 가을, 벛꽃, 노을 같은 parade
이거 하나 잊지 마라
Toi qui m’aimais Moi qui t’aimais

너와 나의 last parade parade

나의 사랑아 은하수를 조명 삼아
끝나지 않을 춤을 추어라

젊음의 격동 장밋빛 영롱
꿈 같던 동공 푸르를 몽롱

isi.lyrics:
Lyric MAX - GET IN THE RING

Romanization

Bring on the noise, level up your stamina
Ready to go feeling like an animal
And we've been here before
It's gonna get rough can't get enough

What's your plan why you running
Be a man keep it coming
Listen up hear the sirens
I'm never giving up

I will always stand my ground
Even if I lose it all
Walking through the fire
Nothings gonna make me fall

Get in the ring
I was born to be a true survivor I'm a fighter
Only one of us is getting out of this alive

Get in the ring
Never giving up cause I'm a dreamer
And I will do whatever it takes
I'll shake and break until you go down
So get in the get in the get in the get in the ring

Hear the roar the battle's calling
Backing down no more stalling
I'm in control I take the lead
So tell me, are you ready now?

I will always stand my ground
Even if I lose it all
Walking through the fire
Nothings gonna make me fall

Get in the ring
I was born to be a true survivor I'm a fighter
Only one of us is getting out of this alive

Get in the ring
Never giving up cause I'm a dreamer
And I will do whatever it takes
I'll shake and break until you go down
So get in the get in the get in the get in the ring

Know you're trying best
But you can not please them
Stuck on the ropes
You're running out of options
Just let it go you're barely breathing
Demons taking over your mind
Got that empty look in your eyes
You got plenty reasons to hide
Nothing stopping from taking off your gloves
Yeah
This time you're out of luck
Gotta love that rush when the crowd goes silent

Get in the ring
I was born to be a true survivor I'm a fighter
Only one of us is getting out of this alive

Get in the ring
Never giving up cause I'm a dreamer
And I will do whatever it takes
I'll shake and break until you go down
So get in the get in the get in the get in the ring

Only one of us is getting out of this alive

I'll shake and break until you go down

Hear the roar the battle's calling
Backing down no more stalling
I'm in control I take the lead
So tell me, are you ready now?

I will always stand my ground
Even if I lose it all
Walking through the fire
Nothings gonna make me fall

Get in the ring
I was born to be a true survivor I'm a fighter
Only one of us is getting out of this alive

Get in the ring
Never giving up cause I'm a dreamer
